recent_calls.summary: The user called and requested to speak with a live representative. The agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent to assist the user further.

The user called to schedule a service appointment for their cooling system through their home warranty but had trouble submitting the request online. The agent confirmed the details and attempted to schedule the appointment for the next day, then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance with the dispatch number. The call ended with a successful transfer to a live agent.

Renata Taylor called to inquire about scheduling a home warranty claim for her air conditioning, which stopped cooling after running briefly. The agent confirmed details including the dispatch number, service address, and service type, and informed her that the team would contact her to schedule the appointment. Renata also expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs.

The user called to check the status of a claim and provided the dispatch ID number to the agent. The agent confirmed the information and assured the user that a team member would follow up soon. The call ended with the user expressing thanks and no further requests.
The user requested to cancel today's appointment and then asked to speak with a live agent. The call was successfully transferred to another agent for further assistance.

The user called to inquire about the technician's arrival time. The agent confirmed the user's details and found the appointment scheduled for 11 AM to 12 PM, but since it was already past that time, the call was transferred to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called to check on their technician. The agent attempted to assist but then transferred the call to a live agent for further help.

The user called to discuss charges and specifically requested to speak with Angie. The agent apologized for not having direct billing access and transferred the call to the billing team for further assistance.
The user called Budget and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer promptly.

The user, Jackie Qualls, reported an air conditioning unit not cooling and requested a service appointment for Wednesday morning, the twentieth. The agent collected all necessary information, confirmed the details, and informed the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them shortly. The user declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

The user called to inquire about the cost of checking their air conditioning system. The initial agent was unable to provide pricing details and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to inquire about the schedule for an air conditioning check at their service address. The agent collected the ZIP code and then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called customer service and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 19 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.
The user called Budget and requested customer service. The agent promptly initiated a transfer to a live agent to assist the user further.

The user, Sheila, called to inquire about repeated emails indicating that a signed document was not received despite her signing it. The agent, Sophie, acknowledged the issue and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

Michael called to inquire about the status of his HVAC technician appointment. The agent was unable to find an appointment in the system and offered to transfer him to a live representative, which Michael accepted. The call was successfully transferred to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to report an issue with a DocuSign document not being recognized as signed despite signing it. The agent acknowledged the issue and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

Janet called to request a technician to check her air conditioner, which was installed last July and is running but not blowing much air. She preferred an afternoon appointment on Wednesday, and the agent successfully booked her for 2 PM on May 20, 2026. The call ended with confirmation of the booking and a polite closing.
The user requested to speak with a supervisor, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent who could assist further.

The user reported that their air conditioning unit installed by Budget is not cooling and requested a service appointment. The agent booked an appointment for the next day at noon and confirmed the user's contact details. The user was satisfied with the interaction and gave positive feedback.
Kimberly from American Home Shield called to discuss a dispatch and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 24 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.
The user asked to speak with Amy, and the agent transferred the call to the appropriate live agent successfully. The call ended shortly after the transfer was completed.

The user, Scott, called to schedule an air conditioning checkup at his Edwardsville address for June 10th in the afternoon. The agent confirmed the details but had no available slots for that date and offered to contact him when availability opens. The call ended with the agent transferring Scott to a live representative for further assistance.

David Kitt called to request HVAC service for a four ton central air unit with a wiring issue located on top of a food trailer at 1600 Mid Rivers Mall, Saint Peters, Missouri. The agent confirmed the details and informed David that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact him shortly. David declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

Alicia from American Home Shield called to follow up on a dispatch and inquire about out-of-pocket costs. The agent, Sophie, informed her that billing information was not accessible and transferred the call to the billing team for assistance.
The user called to speak with someone about their estimate. The agent attempted to assist but then transferred the call to a live agent for further help.

The user called to clarify the location of their technician, expressing confusion about the technician's whereabouts. The agent acknowledged the confusion and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The agent confirmed the user's appointment for air conditioner service on Tuesday, May 19th, between 11 AM and 12 PM, and noted the user's update that they will be home after 11 AM. The call concluded with no further requests from the user.

The user called to inquire about an existing appointment but the agent could not find it in the system. The user requested to be transferred to a live representative, and the agent successfully transferred the call. No appointment was scheduled or confirmed during the call.

Marvin Coleman called to schedule his yearly maintenance for his residential air conditioning. The agent confirmed the service details and booked an appointment for Wednesday, May 20, 2026, at 10 AM. The call ended after the booking was successfully made and the agent requested feedback.
The user, Valerie, called to speak with Amy or Nicole and was promptly transferred to a live agent who could assist her. The call ended with a successful transfer without further conversation.

The user called to set up a cooling system service appointment due to an unresolved compressor issue. The agent confirmed the user's details and scheduled the appointment for Friday at 2 PM. The user provided positive feedback with a rating of 4 out of 5.

The user, an escalation specialist from American Home Shield, called to clarify details about a work order related to an AC unit and requested assistance. The agent acknowledged the information and transferred the call to a live agent for further help.

Philip called to schedule a service call for his air conditioning unit through American Home Shield. The agent confirmed the service details, including the correct address and dispatch number, and informed Philip that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact him shortly. Philip declined information about maintenance programs and requested to speak with a live person, after which the call was transferred successfully.

Nicole called to confirm an appointment for April 27th, but the agent could not find any appointment on that date. Nicole requested to be transferred to a live representative, and the agent successfully transferred the call.

The user called to schedule a routine HVAC tune-up under their American Home Shield home warranty. The agent collected necessary details and informed the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them to complete the scheduling. The user declined information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the ease of the interaction, though expressed dissatisfaction about not being able to schedule immediately.

The user, Rhonda Carol, called to request a quote for a new AC unit as her current one doesn't work. The agent successfully booked an appointment for a quote on Wednesday, May 20th at 8 AM and confirmed the details with the user. The call ended with the user declining to provide feedback but expressing thanks.

Samuel called to schedule a routine maintenance appointment for his air conditioning system. The agent confirmed details, offered available time slots on May 26, and successfully booked the appointment for 10 AM. The call concluded with the agent informing Samuel about the dispatch fee and requesting feedback, which Samuel declined.
The user called to request a copy of the work done by Ryan Cole for their records. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent who could assist further.

The user, Emmanuel from American Home Shield, called to discuss an air conditioning service request assigned to the company. He expressed that the customer was uncomfortable with the scheduled appointment date and requested to speak to a live agent. The call was then transferred to a live agent for further assistance.
The user, Matt, called back in response to a call from Amy and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The agent facilitated a successful call transfer without any issues.

The user called to inquire about resetting a thermostat but declined to schedule a service appointment after the agent explained that a licensed technician would be needed for assistance. The call ended with the user deciding to handle the issue independently.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak to Gigi, and the agent transferred the call to the appropriate live agent. The call ended with a successful transfer.
The user requested to speak to someone, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to schedule a replacement for evaporative cooling coils under a home warranty. The agent requested the home warranty dispatch number, which the user did not have, and then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The call ended with a successful transfer.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to confirm their appointment scheduled for May 18, 2026, between 10 AM and 12 noon. The agent confirmed the appointment details and noted the user's requests for a heads-up before arrival and a confirmation call from the team. The call ended with the agent assuring the user that their requests would be passed on.

The user called to inquire about the price of exchanging a hot water heater and was transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent was unable to provide a quote over the phone and initiated a call transfer.

The user called to inquire about the status of their air conditioner repair, mentioning that a technician had come out but the issue was not yet resolved due to a part that needed to be installed. The agent acknowledged the user's frustration and transferred the call to someone who could provide live updates on the repair status.
